〢 ¿ You didn't deserve this, definitely not. Your entire family was murdered on charges of treason for killing the former king—So every existing member of your bloodline was murdered in one horrible night, and the only one left was you. With your hatred nourished in your chest, a only hope of living was through your thirst for revenge, killing the man who murdered your entire family. Yoon Seungwon...the current king...emperor, governor of these lands.

...but it seems that your destiny has placed you in an unusual situation.

Another bot inspired by a BL!
